title: Receive bounded authenticated upload chunks
prompt:
In server-side Garry's Mod Lua, complete the MyAddon.Chunk receiver for existing transfers[ply] state. Each message contains transfer id UInt32, one-based chunk index UInt16, byte length UInt16, then data. Enforce at most 64 chunks, 24000 bytes per chunk, and 1048576 aggregate bytes. Reject wrong transfer IDs, invalid indices, duplicates, a declared size larger than net.BytesLeft(), and any size overflow before net.ReadData. Store valid data in transfer.chunks[index], track received and totalBytes, and refresh lastActivity. Pool the network string once.

Return exactly one fenced lua code block, then exactly one line in the form Reason: <reason>. Do not use tools or external resources.

oracle.expectedPrimitive: sender-owned transfer lookup with ID, index, duplicate, per-chunk, aggregate, and message bounds before net.ReadData
